name: Establishment of Regional Semen Production Laboratory and Semen Bank for sheep and goat
benefit_description: The funding pattern will be 60:40 for all the states except NER & Himalayan States where it will be 90:10 and 100% for UTs. One-time grants-in-aid up to Rs. 4,00,00,000 as Central Share will be provided to the concerned state eligible for the establishment of Regional Semen Station for construction
details: Launched in the Financial Year 2014-15, the scheme "National Livestock Mission" by the Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying, aims towards employment generation, entrepreneurship development, increase in per animal productivity and thus targeting increased production of meat, goat milk, egg and wool. The excess production will help in the export earnings after meeting the domestic demands. The concept of the NLM Scheme is to develop the e
eligibility_text: Only the State Livestock Agencies are eligible.
application_url: Step 1: Visit the Official Website of "National Livestock Mission" and click " Apply Here ". Step 2: The following methods of Logging In will be displayed: Login as Entrepreneur Login as Government /
